title: ContextPacket
description: A time-bound, attributable unit of context exchange governed by ALCOA principles.

schema_version.description: Schema version for this context packet. Enables forward compatibility and audit stability.

context_id.description: Unique identifier for this context packet. (ALCOA: Attributable)

intent.description: Declared purpose for which this context was promoted. Must be explicit and human-intended.

scope.description: Logical boundary for this context (project, task, or session). Prevents cross-contamination. (ALCOA: Accurate)

source.description: Originating device or application that produced the context. (ALCOA: Attributable)

actor.description: Human or system responsible for promoting this context. No anonymous promotion allowed. (ALCOA: Attributable)

payload.description: Original, human-legible context content. Must not be silently transformed. (ALCOA: Original)

created_at.description: Timestamp when the context was created, at the moment of relevance. (ALCOA: Contemporaneous)

ttl.description: Time-to-live duration (e.g., '30m', '2h'). Context without TTL is invalid.

expires_at.description: Calculated expiration timestamp. Routing MUST reject expired context. (Time as Control)

permissions.description: Explicitly allowed operations on this context (e.g., summarize, compare, debug). Defaults to none.

annotations.description: Optional, non-authoritative metadata. Must not alter original payload or intent.
